title: Behind the Scenes of Game Development
description: Interview detailing the trajectory from the first mobile game at BGS 2017 to experience with MMORPGs and Shooter RPGs, discussing technical challenges and tips for new developers.

title: Campus Party Brasil 2024
description: Sharing insights about careers in digital games, programming techniques, and essential tools for the market.

title: Izocast (Izotonic Studios)
description: Chat about starting a career in games, challenges faced, and details about developed projects.

title: Felementech Podcast
description: Participation in an episode focused on software engineering and women's engagement in the game development field.

title: SBGAMES
description: Technical mentorship in a collaborative environment, supporting programming challenges resolution and strategic guidance of teams.

title: Webinar: The Beginning of Programming
description: Exploring the importance of planning code and logic before implementation, focusing on process organization, Pair Programming, and career transition to game development.

title: She Lovelace: Women in the Games Market
description: Panel about the job market for women in the games industry, addressing entry challenges, technical development, and the current state of the sector.

title: Trajectory in Game Development
description: Discussion on the first steps in a games career, overcoming obstacles in the sector, and sharing experience as a Game Programmer at INSANE.

title: Toti
description: Technical training for women in game programming, focusing on professional skills and female representation in technology.

title: Talk on Market Experience
description: Participation in a panel discussing relevant topics in the current market and sharing the professional journey lived in technology.

title: Graduation Project Jury - FATEC São Caetano
description: Participation as a member of the examining committee for the Digital Games course, evaluating final graduation projects.

title: Women Game Jam
description: Technical assistance in game programming and team guidance in developing projects under tight deadlines (Game Jam).
